ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., master's, doctoral, post-baccalaureate) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college offering the program */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school offering the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the program was first offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the program was last offered or discontinued */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the program is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college to which the department belongs */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school to which the department belongs */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the college */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school to which the college belongs */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the college */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colleges_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program director */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the director is assigned to */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the program director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the program director */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the program director */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the director started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the director ended their role */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the director is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_directors_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program advisor */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the advisor is assigned to */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the program advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the program advisor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the program advisor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor ended their role */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the advisor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_advisors_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditations" (
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the accreditation belongs to */,
  "accreditation_name" TEXT /* Name of the accrediting agency */,
  "accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date of accreditation */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the accreditation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the accreditation (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accreditation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program length */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the length belongs to */,
  "length_type" TEXT /* Type of program length (e.g., credits, years) */,
  "length_value" INTEGER /* Value of the program length */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the program */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_lengths_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curriculum_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the requirement belongs to */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the curriculum requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the curriculum requirement */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours required for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses or requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the enrollment belongs to */,
  "enrollment_number" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "semesters_offered" TEXT /* Semesters in which the program is offered */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., program director, advisor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
